generated_exposure.exposure_text: I've been volunteering with local emergency response teams for years, and let me tell you - the best way to protect our communities isn't just more government spending on fancy systems. What we really need is for neighbors to look out for each other. That's why I support community-based preparedness programs over top-down civil defense schemes. Real security comes from trust and local knowledge, not bureaucratic checklists. #CommunityFirst #NeighborhoodWatch
